name: No photos or papers, can I still win a fume exposure case?
description: Yes, testimony + medical + job proof suffices often.

mainEntity.name: No photos or papers, can I still win a fume exposure case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, testimony + medical + job proof suffices often.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, via medical history, coworker testimony, industry standards.** Cumulative exposure inferred from job title/duties[3]. Key factors: Consistent symptoms timeline; expert reconstruction; employer admissions. Utah accepts circumstantial. Reconstruct via old paystubs, union records. Strong MD report key.
